The Board of Directors of the Company will meet on Friday, 8th November 2019, to 
consider the Financial Results for the quarter ended 30th September 2019. 
An Earnings Call has been scheduled at 04:30 pm (1ST) on Friday, 8th November 2019. 
Mr. G. Shivakumar, Executive Director/ CFO would give a financial snapshot and

discuss the Company's financial performance. This would be followed by a Q&A
